OPENING_MOMENT: the shift the reactor seal fails quietly
ROUTE_A_APPROACH: the manifest of the flooding lower bays
ROUTE_B_APPROACH: Tomas Reyes, the last living technician
ROUTE_D_APPROACH: the venting leak against the hull
MA_KEPT: A Contract Kept Silent But Whole
MC_KEPT: A Manifest Preserved Without a Name
NB_GATE: The Last Voice on the Station
ROUTE_NC_CONFIDANT: the leak's own record against the hull
ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE: reconciling Kestrel Station with its forgetting
R1_OUTCOME_A: Bore It Alone and the Station Held
R1_OUTCOME_B: Broke From the Engineer and Made It New
R1_OUTCOME_C: The Station Remembers and Is Not Broken
R1_OUTCOME_D: Held the Line and Kept the Bay
R1_OUTCOME_E: Carried the Truth Into the Breach
R1_OUTCOME_F: Sealed the Truth for a Kinder Shift
R1_OUTCOME_G: Signed It True and the Pressure Fell
R1_OUTCOME_H: Left It Unclaimed and the Station Chose
ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE: saving the one irreplaceable log of Kestrel Station
R2_OUTCOME_B: Broke the Seal and Carried It Out
R2_OUTCOME_C: Spoke It and Saved the Page
R2_OUTCOME_E: Ran the Manifest Through the Breach
R2_OUTCOME_F: Sealed It and Lost the Rest to Vacuum
R2_OUTCOME_G: Signed and Saved the Engineer Hand
R2_OUTCOME_H: Left It Unsigned but Safe and Dry
ROUTE_R3_RESOLVE: making peace with what the leak will take
R3_OUTCOME_A: Let the Low Bays Go in Peace
R3_OUTCOME_B: Broke From the Engineer's Fear of Loss
R3_OUTCOME_C: Told the Station and Let It Grieve
R3_OUTCOME_D: Held Vigil While the Pressure Rose
R3_OUTCOME_E: Walked It Out Into the Cold
R3_OUTCOME_F: Sealed It and Felt the Old Dread
R3_OUTCOME_G: Named the Loss and Made It Bearable
R3_OUTCOME_H: Left No Name on the Empty Rack
ROUTE_R4_RESOLVE: salvaging a single log from a losing shift
R4_OUTCOME_A: Alone in the Dark, One Log Saved
R4_OUTCOME_B: Went Off the Engineer's Map, Kept a Scrap
R4_OUTCOME_C: Spoke to No One and Saved the Corner
R4_OUTCOME_D: Held the Line Till the Line Gave
R4_OUTCOME_E: Carried One Page Into the Cold
R4_OUTCOME_F: Sealed a Bay That Was Already Full
R4_OUTCOME_G: Signed for a Page, the Rest Was Lost
R4_OUTCOME_H: Unsigned, Unsettled, but Safe by Dawn
